meta.title: Systemic — CRM, magazzino, finanze e spedizioni per aziende
meta.description: Clienti, appuntamenti, ordini, magazzino, stipendi, Nova Poshta, Meest Express, Telegram, Checkbox — tutto in un unico sistema. Prova 7 giorni gratis.

hero.title: Gestisci il tuo business, non fogli di calcolo
hero.subtitle: CRM per saloni, cliniche e negozi: calendario, cassa, magazzino, finanze, fidelizzazione e spedizioni — dalla prenotazione allo scontrino fiscale, senza programmi extra.
hero.trustLine: Prova gratuita · Nessuna carta di credito · Inizia in 5 minuti

painPoints.title: Ti suona familiare?
painPoints.subtitle: Ecco cosa affrontano i titolari d'azienda ogni giorno — finché non automatizzano

items.title: I clienti si perdono tra i canali
items.description: Qualcuno ha scritto su Telegram, qualcuno ha chiamato, qualcuno è venuto senza appuntamento. Nessun database unico — nessun controllo.

items.title: Il profitto è un mistero
items.description: I soldi entrano ed escono, ma quanto guadagni davvero — non è chiaro. La cassa non torna, gli stipendi calcolati con la calcolatrice.

items.title: Il magazzino vive di vita propria
items.description: Prodotto esaurito — lo scopri dal cliente. Le scorte in Excel erano già obsolete ieri. Nessuno registra gli scarichi.

items.title: Routine invece di crescita
items.description: Appuntamenti su taccuini, bolle di spedizione a mano, promemoria a memoria. 3 ore al giorno per quello che un sistema fa in secondi.

features.title: Tutto per gestire la tua azienda — in un'unica finestra
features.subtitle: Non servono 10 abbonamenti. Ogni modulo lavora con gli altri — i dati si completano, mai duplicati.

items.title: Database clienti
items.description: Schede complete con cronologia visite, acquisti e messaggi. Categorie, tag, ricerca per qualsiasi campo. Compleanni e note.

items.title: Calendario appuntamenti
items.description: Pianificazione comoda della giornata. Più professionisti, servizi e sedi. Visite ricorrenti e promemoria automatici.

items.title: Ordini e spedizioni
items.description: Dalla creazione alla consegna. Creazione automatica bolle via Nova Poshta e Meest Express. Scarico magazzino alla spedizione.

items.title: Magazzino e acquisti
items.description: Catalogo prodotti, scorte per magazzino, acquisti, movimenti. Scarico automatico nelle vendite. Avvisi scorte basse.

items.title: Finanze in tempo reale
items.description: Transazioni, cassa, risultato finanziario per qualsiasi periodo. Vedi il profitto ogni giorno, non a fine mese.

items.title: Stipendi e motivazione
items.description: Percentuale sui servizi, fisso, bonus — qualsiasi schema. Calcolo automatico per periodo. Motiva il team in trasparenza.

items.title: Programmi fedeltà
items.description: Programmi bonus, accumulo punti, coupon e codici promo. I clienti tornano più spesso.

items.title: Produzione
items.description: Schede tecniche (ricette), ordini di produzione, controllo consumo materiali. Per caffetterie, cucine, micro-produzioni.

items.title: Telegram, SMS, Email
items.description: Promemoria visite, messaggistica bidirezionale con i clienti via bot Telegram. Notifiche SMS ed email.

items.title: Ricevute fiscali (Checkbox)
items.description: Registratore fiscale Checkbox per creare ricevute fiscali. Piena conformità alla legislazione ucraina.

items.title: Ruoli e controllo accessi
items.description: Limita l'accesso a moduli specifici. Lo specialista vede solo il suo programma, l'admin — tutto. Ogni azione viene registrata.

showcases.title: Appuntamenti, visite, clienti abituali — in automatico
showcases.description: Per saloni, cliniche, studi e tutti coloro che lavorano su appuntamento. Database clienti con cronologia completa, calendario di pianificazione, promemoria automatici — i clienti arrivano puntuali, tu non perdi tempo in chiamate.
bullets: Calendario appuntamenti con filtri per professionista e sede
Promemoria automatici via Telegram, SMS, Email
Programmi fedeltà, coupon e bonus per visite ricorrenti

showcases.title: Dall'ordine a 'Ricevuto' — senza lavoro manuale
showcases.description: Per negozi online e venditori marketplace. Ciclo completo: creare → imballare → bolla → spedire → consegnare. Il magazzino si scarica automaticamente, la bolla si crea in un clic.
bullets: Creazione automatica bolle (Nova Poshta, Meest Express)
Magazzino con scarico automatico alla spedizione

showcases.title: Vendita rapida, magazzino e ricevuta fiscale — in un'unica finestra
showcases.description: Per caffetterie, negozi, showroom. Vendita rapida alla cassa, scarico automatico dal magazzino, ricevuta fiscale via Checkbox. Schede tecniche per micro-produzioni — controlla il consumo degli ingredienti.
bullets: Vendite POS con scarico automatico dal magazzino
Schede tecniche e ordini di produzione per micro-produzioni

showcases.title: Conosci il tuo profitto — ogni giorno, non a fine mese
showcases.description: Cassa, transazioni, risultato finanziario, stipendi — tutto calcolato automaticamente. Il monitor aziendale mostra le metriche chiave in tempo reale. Prendi decisioni basate sui numeri, non sull'intuizione.
bullets: Calcolo automatico stipendi per schemi di motivazione
Monitor aziendale con KPI chiave in tempo reale

howItWorks.title: Inizia in 5 minuti
howItWorks.subtitle: Tre semplici passaggi per automatizzare la tua azienda

steps.title: Registrati
steps.description: Crea un account e configura la tua azienda: nome, sedi, servizi.

steps.title: Aggiungi il tuo team
steps.description: Invita il personale, configura ruoli e orari di lavoro.

steps.title: Al lavoro!
steps.description: Registra clienti, vendi prodotti, controlla le finanze. Tutto in un unico posto.

pricing.title: Prezzi trasparenti
pricing.subtitle: Nessun costo nascosto. Tutti i moduli inclusi.
pricing.allModules: Tutti i 46 moduli in ogni piano

items.name: Andriy M.
items.text: Il bot Telegram è pura magia. I clienti ricevono promemoria e noi vediamo le loro risposte direttamente nel CRM.

items.name: Serhiy M.
items.text: Finalmente tutto in un unico posto. Prima tenevamo i registri su quaderni e le finanze su Excel. Ora vedo tutto in 5 minuti.

items.name: Iryna D.
items.text: Magazzino e vendite funzionano alla perfezione. Spediamo gli ordini tramite Nova Poshta direttamente dal sistema.

items.question: Devo installare un software?
items.answer: No. Systemic funziona nel browser — su computer, tablet e telefono. Nulla da installare.

items.question: C'è una prova gratuita?
items.answer: Sì, ogni nuovo account riceve 7 giorni di prova gratuita con accesso completo a tutti i moduli. Nessuna carta di credito richiesta.

items.question: Quali integrazioni sono supportate?
items.answer: Nova Poshta, Meest Express, bot Telegram, Checkbox (registratore fiscale), SMS e notifiche Email. Tutte le integrazioni incluse in ogni piano.

items.question: Posso migrare i dati da un altro sistema?
items.answer: Sì, ti aiuteremo a migrare i dati da Excel o un altro CRM. Contatta il nostro supporto.

items.question: Funziona su telefono?
items.answer: Sì, l'interfaccia responsive funziona su qualsiasi dispositivo con browser — smartphone, tablet, laptop.

items.question: Posso gestire più sedi?
items.answer: Sì, Systemic supporta la gestione multi-sede. Ogni sede può avere il suo team, programma e magazzino, mentre finanze e database clienti restano condivisi.

items.question: Come funziona il controllo accessi?
items.answer: Puoi limitare l'accesso dei dipendenti a moduli specifici. Ad esempio, uno specialista vedrà solo il suo programma, non le finanze o il database clienti.

items.question: Quanti dipendenti posso aggiungere?
items.answer: Dipende dal piano: Start — fino a 2, Business — fino a 5, Pro — fino a 15 utenti.

cta.title: Smetti di destreggiarti tra dieci strumenti diversi
cta.subtitle: Prova Systemic gratis — dopo 7 giorni non vorrai più tornare ai fogli di calcolo

footer.tagline: CRM per piccole e medie imprese

terms.title: Termini di servizio — Systemic CRM
terms.effectiveDate: Data di entrata in vigore: 18 marzo 2026
sections:
1. General Provisions

1.1. These Terms of Service (hereinafter — "Terms") govern the relationship between LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK" (hereinafter — "Provider") and an individual or legal entity (hereinafter — "User") using the Systemic CRM cloud service (hereinafter — "Service"), available at https://app.systemic-crm.com.

1.2. By registering for the Service, the User fully and unconditionally accepts these Terms.

1.3. The Provider reserves the right to amend the Terms by notifying the User at least 14 days before the changes take effect, via email or an in-app notification.

2. Description of the Service

2.1. Systemic CRM is a cloud-based customer, appointment, finance, and staff management system for small and medium-sized businesses.

2.2. The Service is provided on a SaaS (Software as a Service) subscription basis.

2.3. The Provider continuously improves the Service and reserves the right to add, modify, or remove functionality without prior notice, provided such changes do not materially affect the core features of the User's paid plan.

3. Registration and Account

3.1. To use the Service, the User must create an account by providing a valid email address and business name.

3.2. The User is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their password and for all actions performed under their account.

3.3. The User must immediately notify the Provider of any unauthorized access to their account.

3.4. One account corresponds to one business (tenant). Creating multiple free accounts to circumvent plan limitations is prohibited.

4. Pricing Plans and Payment

4.1. The Service offers the following plans: Trial (7 days free), Start, Business, and Pro. Current pricing and feature lists are available on the pricing page within the Service.

4.2. Payments are processed monthly via the LiqPay payment system. Subscriptions renew automatically each month.

4.3. The User may cancel their subscription at any time. Access to the paid plan remains active until the end of the current billing period.

4.4. Systemic CRM is a digital service (SaaS) with immediate access upon payment. In accordance with applicable consumer protection laws, refunds for paid subscription periods are not available. Full details are provided on the Refund & Exchange page.

4.5. The Provider may change prices by giving the User at least 30 days' notice. New prices take effect from the next billing period.

5. User Rights and Obligations

5.1. The User has the right to:

  • use the Service in accordance with their paid plan;
  • export their data at any time;
  • delete their account and all associated data.

5.2. The User agrees to:

  • not use the Service for illegal activities;
  • not attempt to gain unauthorized access to other users' data;
  • not overload the Service with automated requests (scraping, DDoS);
  • not share account access with third parties without the Provider's consent.

6. Provider Rights and Obligations

6.1. The Provider undertakes to:

  • maintain Service availability of at least 99% per month (excluding scheduled maintenance);
  • maintain the confidentiality of User data;
  • provide at least 24 hours' notice of scheduled maintenance.

6.2. The Provider reserves the right to:

  • suspend User access in the event of a breach of these Terms;
  • suspend access in the event of non-payment after the paid period expires;
  • delete data of inactive free accounts 90 days after the trial period ends.

7. Limitation of Liability

7.1. The Service is provided "as is." The Provider does not guarantee that the Service will operate without interruption or error.

7.2. The Provider's maximum liability is limited to the amount paid by the User for the last 3 months of Service usage.

7.3. The Provider is not liable for:

  • data loss resulting from User actions;
  • outages caused by third parties (hosting provider, payment system, internet service provider);
  • indirect damages or lost profits.

8. Intellectual Property

8.1. All rights to the Service, its code, design, and trademarks belong to the Provider.

8.2. Data uploaded by the User remains the property of the User.

8.3. The Provider does not use User data for AI model training, analytics, or sale to third parties.

9. Termination

9.1. The User may stop using the Service at any time by deleting their account in the settings.

9.2. The Provider may terminate the User's access to the Service in the event of:

  • systematic breach of these Terms;
  • non-payment for 30 days after the paid period expires;
  • use of the Service for illegal activities.

9.3. Upon account deletion, all User data is removed within 30 days.

10. Dispute Resolution

10.1. All disputes shall be resolved through negotiation. If an agreement cannot be reached, disputes shall be settled in accordance with the applicable laws of Ukraine.

10.2. These Terms are governed by the laws of Ukraine.

11. Contact Information

Provider: LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK"

Email: support@systemic-crm.com

Address: Ukraine, 02002, Kyiv, 8 Okipnoi Raisy St., office 397

privacy.title: Informativa sulla privacy — Systemic CRM
privacy.effectiveDate: Data di entrata in vigore: 18 marzo 2026
sections:
1. General Provisions

1.1. This Privacy Policy (hereinafter — "Policy") describes how LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK" (hereinafter — "Provider," "we") collects, uses, stores, and protects the personal data of users of the Systemic CRM service (hereinafter — "Service").

1.2. By using the Service, you agree to the terms of this Policy.

1.3. We comply with the requirements of the Law of Ukraine "On the Protection of Personal Data" and, when processing data of EU residents, the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

2. Data We Collect

2.1. Data you provide during registration:

  • Email address
  • Password (stored in encrypted form in Firebase Authentication)
  • Business name
  • Contact person's name

2.2. Data you enter while using the Service:

  • Customer information (names, phone numbers, notes)
  • Appointments, orders, financial transactions
  • Staff data (names, contacts, schedules)
  • Integration settings (API keys are stored in encrypted form)

2.3. Data collected automatically:

  • IP address (for security and audit purposes)
  • Browser and device type
  • Error data (via Sentry — without personal data)

3. How We Use Your Data

3.1. Your data is used exclusively for:

  • Providing and improving the Service
  • Authentication and account security
  • Sending service notifications (payments, Service changes)
  • Technical support

3.2. We do NOT use your data for:

  • Selling or sharing with third parties
  • Marketing communications without your consent
  • Training artificial intelligence models
  • Profiling or targeted advertising

4. Data Storage and Security

4.1. Data is stored on Google Cloud Platform servers (Firebase/Firestore) in European data centers.

4.2. We apply the following security measures:

  • Data encryption in transit (TLS/HTTPS)
  • Encryption of sensitive fields (API keys, integration passwords)
  • Authentication via Firebase Authentication
  • Data isolation between different businesses (tenants)
  • Regular backups
  • Audit logs of all changes

4.3. Access to the database is restricted to authorized technical personnel of the Provider.

5. Data Sharing with Third Parties

5.1. We use the following third-party services for the operation of the Service:

ServicePurposeData Received
Google FirebaseDatabase hosting, authenticationAll Service data
VercelWeb application and API hostingRequest logs (IP, URL)
LiqPayPayment processingEmail, payment amount
SentryError monitoringTechnical data (no PII)
ResendEmail notificationsRecipient email addresses

5.2. Each of these services has its own privacy policy and meets security standards.

5.3. We do not sell or share your data with any other third parties, except as required by law.

6. Third-Party Integrations

6.1. The Service supports integrations with Telegram, Nova Poshta, Checkbox, Rozetka, Prom.ua, and other services.

6.2. Data is shared with these services only at the User's initiative and only to the extent necessary for the integration to function.

6.3. API keys and passwords for integrations are stored in encrypted form and are never transmitted to the client device.

7. Your Rights

7.1. You have the right to:

  • Access — obtain a copy of all your data (via the "Export Data" feature in the Service)
  • Rectification — modify or update your data at any time
  • Erasure — delete your account and all associated data (via the "Delete Account" option in settings)
  • Restriction of processing — request suspension of your data processing
  • Portability — receive your data in a machine-readable format (JSON)

7.2. To exercise these rights, contact support@systemic-crm.com. We will respond within 30 days.

8. Cookies

8.1. The Service uses only technical cookies necessary for:

  • Maintaining an authenticated session (Firebase Auth)
  • Saving interface preferences (language, theme)

8.2. We do not use marketing, analytics, or advertising cookies.

9. Data Retention and Deletion

9.1. Data of active accounts is retained for the entire duration of Service usage.

9.2. After account deletion:

  • Database records are deleted within 30 days
  • Backups containing your data are deleted within 90 days
  • Error logs in Sentry are retained for 90 days
  • Server logs in Vercel are retained for 30 days

9.3. Data of inactive free accounts is deleted 90 days after the trial period ends.

10. Changes to This Policy

10.1. We may update this Policy. We will notify you of material changes via email or an in-app notification at least 14 days in advance.

10.2. Continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.

11. Contact Information

For privacy and data protection inquiries:

Provider: LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK"

Email: support@systemic-crm.com

Address: Ukraine, 02002, Kyiv, 8 Okipnoi Raisy St., office 397

refund.title: Politica di rimborso e cambio
refund.effectiveDate: Data di entrata in vigore: 19 marzo 2026
sections:
1. General Provisions

1.1. Systemic CRM is a cloud-based service (SaaS) provided on a monthly subscription basis. Access to the Service is activated immediately upon payment.

1.2. This page describes the terms for refunds and exchange of services in accordance with applicable Ukrainian law and payment system requirements.

2. Nature of the Service

2.1. Systemic CRM is a digital service, not a physical product. Upon payment, the User immediately receives full access to the features of the selected plan for 1 (one) calendar month.

2.2. Since access is granted immediately and the service begins at the moment of payment, refunds for the paid period are not available, in accordance with Article 12 of the Ukrainian Consumer Protection Law.

3. Exchange of Services

3.1. Switching between plans is available at any time:

  • Upgrade — The User may switch to a higher plan by paying the difference. The new plan is activated immediately.
  • Downgrade — The User may cancel their current subscription. Access to the current plan is maintained until the end of the paid period, after which they can subscribe to a lower plan.

3.2. Exchange for a different type of service is not available, as Systemic CRM is the Provider's sole product.

4. Subscription Cancellation

4.1. The User may cancel their subscription at any time via the "My Plan" section in the Service.

4.2. After cancellation:

  • Access to the paid plan is maintained until the end of the current billing period.
  • Automatic renewal is stopped.
  • After the paid period expires, the account transitions to a free mode (with limitations).

4.3. Partial refunds for unused days of the paid period are not provided.

5. Free Trial

5.1. New users receive a free trial period of 7 days.

5.2. No charges are made during the trial period. The User can evaluate the Service's features and decide whether to subscribe without any financial risk.

5.3. The trial period is not subject to refund or exchange, as it is free of charge.

6. Exceptional Cases

6.1. The Provider may consider individual refund requests in the following cases:

  • Extended technical failure of the Service (more than 72 consecutive hours) that prevented usage.
  • Erroneous double charge.

6.2. To request a review, contact support@systemic-crm.com within 7 days of the issue occurring.

7. Contact Information

For refund and exchange inquiries:

Provider: LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY "SYSTEMIK"

Email: support@systemic-crm.com

Address: Ukraine, 02002, Kyiv, 8 Okipnoi Raisy St., office 397
